You purchase a certain product. The manual states that the life-time T of the product, defined as the amount of time (in years) the product works properly until it breaks down, satisfies

You purchase the product and use it for two years without any problems. The probability that it breaks down in the third year is _________

(upto three decimal places).

NAT
Correct answer: 0.181
Solution

0.181 [0.180 - 0.185]
